tech_stack: Go 1.25 (chi, pgx, sqlc, gRPC) + React 19 + TypeScript 5.7 + Tailwind CSS 4.2 + Vite 6.2 + pnpm workspaces

detected_context.design_system: Precision Clarity — dark-first, 95% grayscale, 3 signal colors (healthy/critical/warning), user-configurable accent

color_tokens.accent_subtle: var(--accent-subtle) — accent at 8% opacity for backgrounds
color_tokens.accent_border: var(--accent-border) — accent at 30% opacity for borders

typography.mono: GeistMono Variable — data, numbers, IDs, table headers, section labels

page_patterns.listing: PageHeader + FilterBar (search + filters + table/grid toggle) + optional StatChips + DataTable/GridView
page_patterns.form: Right slide panel (560px) with live preview on main page
page_patterns.dashboard: 4-col stat rows + mixed fractional grid widgets

detected_context.table_anatomy: expand chevron (left) + data columns + status + kebab menu (right). Selection mode: checkboxes hidden until activated. Every column sortable. Filter bar + search + view toggle on top.
detected_context.component_library: @patchiq/ui (32 components: 10 custom + 22 shadcn/ui primitives, Radix UI base)

apps.name: web (Patch Manager)
apps.description: Primary admin UI — dashboards, endpoints, patches, CVEs, deployments, workflows, compliance, audit

apps.name: web-hub (Hub Manager)
apps.description: SaaS hub — catalog, feeds, licenses, clients

apps.name: web-agent (Agent)
apps.description: Local agent UI — status, patches, hardware, software, history
